description: Schema contract for deterministic source-backed combo damage calculation outputs.
notes: Only source-backed ledgers are valid input.
Rational values must be represented as integers or exact rational strings such as 6/5.

Optional attack_step, scaling_note, damage_granularity, and segment_type fields document source-backed scaling progression and calculation granularity; they are trace fields and do not change arithmetic.
Optional hit_span must identify one damaging hit or one explicit damage segment. Aggregated ranges such as 10-16 are rejected.
damage_granularity=move_total represents a source-backed full move total such as a Super Art total; segment_type is required for move_total so internal hit split is not implied.
Human-provided training-mode observations can support regression_fixture ledgers, but do not by themselves create validated_rule authority.
Candidate fixtures and working hypotheses must stay outside deterministic combo_damage_calculation outputs.
The calculator does not infer delayed hits, route expansion, patch rollback, juggle state, or distance conditions.
